title: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica
tagline: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica — heritage city of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica is a much-loved heritage city in Kerala, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: The St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Cathedral Basilica is a cathedral in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It was founded in 1112, and is also known by the names Nasrani Palli, Anchikaimal Palli or Thekke Palli. The church is the headquarters of the Major Archeparchy of Ernakulam-Angamaly, which is the Primatal See of the Syro-Malabar Church.

topPlaces.name: Archdiocese of Verapoly
topPlaces.description: The Archdiocese of Verapoly (Malayalam: വരാപ്പുഴ അതിരൂപത, Latin: Archidioecesis Verapolitana) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical territory or archdiocese of the Catholic Church, comprising Latin Catholics of Malabar and headquartered at the city of Cochin, in the south Indian state of Kerala. The archdiocese has administrative control over the suffragan dioceses of Cochin, Kottapuram, and Vijayapuram.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malabar Church
topPlaces.description: The Syro-Malabar Church, also known as the Syro-Malabar Catholic Church or Edtha Qatholiqi d'Malabar Suryaya, is an Eastern Catholic church based in Kerala, India. It is a sui iuris (autonomous) particular church in full communion with the Holy See and the worldwide Catholic Church, with self-governance under the Code of Canons of the Eastern Churches (CCEO).

topPlaces.name: KHCAA Golden Jubilee Chamber Complex
topPlaces.description: KHCAA Golden Jubilee Chamber Complex is a Chambers building of the Kerala High Court Advocates Association in the city of Kochi in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Marine Drive, Kochi
topPlaces.description: Marine Drive, officially the APJ Abdul Kalam Marg, is a promenade in the city of Kochi, India. It is built facing the backwaters and is developed on reclaimed land overlooking the Vembanad Lake system.

topPlaces.name: Sealord Hotel
topPlaces.description: Sealord Hotel is a building situated in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. It was the first high-rise building in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Elookkara
topPlaces.description: Elookkara is a small village in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India, situated 3.6 km from Aluva, Central Kerala, 13 km from Cochin International Airport, and 10.1 km from Aluva Metro Station.

topPlaces.name: 2015 Kerala meteoroid
topPlaces.description: The 2015 Kerala fireball was a meteor air burst that occurred over Kerala state in India on 27 February 2015.

items.note: The Archdiocese of Verapoly (Malayalam: വരാപ്പുഴ അതിരൂപത, Latin: Archidioecesis Verapolitana) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical territory or archdiocese of the Catholic Church, comprising Latin Catholics of Malabar and headquartered at the city of Cochin, in the south Indian state of Kerala. The archdiocese has administrative control over the suffragan dioceses of Cochin, Kottapuram, and Vijayapuram.

The Syro-Malabar Church, also known as the Syro-Malabar Catholic Church or Edtha Qatholiqi d'Malabar Suryaya, is an Eastern Catholic church based in Kerala, India. It is a sui iuris (autonomous) particular church in full communion with the Holy See and the worldwide Catholic Church, with self-governance under the Code of Canons of the Eastern Churches (CCEO).
KHCAA Golden Jubilee Chamber Complex is a Chambers building of the Kerala High Court Advocates Association in the city of Kochi in the state of Kerala, India.

Marine Drive, officially the APJ Abdul Kalam Marg, is a promenade in the city of Kochi, India. It is built facing the backwaters and is developed on reclaimed land overlooking the Vembanad Lake system.
Sealord Hotel is a building situated in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. It was the first high-rise building in Kerala.
Elookkara is a small village in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India, situated 3.6 km from Aluva, Central Kerala, 13 km from Cochin International Airport, and 10.1 km from Aluva Metro Station.
The 2015 Kerala fireball was a meteor air burst that occurred over Kerala state in India on 27 February 2015.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (23 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Basilica?
faq.a: The top attractions are Archdiocese of Verapoly, Syro-Malabar Church, KHCAA Golden Jubilee Chamber Complex, Marine Drive, Kochi, St. Albert's HSS, Ernakulam.
